linkUrl.description: A string containing the link's URL.

memberName.description: Member name may contain any valid JSON value.

topLevelLinks.description: The top-level links object for a collection response, including self and pagination links.

self.description: The link that generated the current JSON document.

first.description: The link to the first page of data.

last.description: The link to the last page of data.

prev.description: The link to the previous page of data. Absent when on the first page.

next.description: The link to the next page of data. Absent when on the last page.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the document was created.
